summary_en: Ａ－ＲＩＺＡＰ　Ｇ authorized a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: Ａ－ＲＩＺＡＰ　Ｇが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: Ａ－ＲＩＺＡＰ　Ｇ announced a material dividend change (first/resumed dividend). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
summary_jp: Ａ－ＲＩＺＡＰ　Ｇが配当方針変更を開示（初配・復配）。資本還元基準が刷新。
